description.pass1_value: APIs and SDKs for voice, SMS, messaging, video and related cloud communications services.
description.final_value: Cloud communications APIs and SDKs for voice, SMS, messaging, video, and verification.

pass1_value.note: Developer documentation and the dashboard sign-up show that developers can create an account and obtain API key & secret from the Developer Dashboard without manual approval.

final_value.note: Vonage’s official account guide states you can obtain/find your API key and secret in the Vonage API Dashboard, indicating self-serve access after creating an account.
